candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; forms majority of Total Revenue and is a standard top-line label.
Explicit total revenue line including operating and other operating revenues; best single top-line measure.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used as top-line.
Generic finance income bucket, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Contract Liabilities - Short-Term - Advance Consideration & Progress Billings in Excess of Unbilled Revenue
candidates.why: Liability, not revenue.
Liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using 'Total Revenue' as primary REVT since it aggregates operating and other operating revenues; 'Operating revenues' kept as fallback for potential label changes over time.

candidates.why: Generic operating expenses; could include overhead; label too vague but may be part of operating cost structure.
Best proxy for cost of sales in a shipping/operations context; appears as main operating cost bucket separate from depreciation and impairment.
Component of operating costs, but narrower than full COGS; better to use broader 'Operating expenses' as COGS proxy.
Clearly SG&A, should be excluded from COGS.
Financial, not operating cost of sales.
Financial, not operating cost of sales.
Net financial result, not COGS.
Likely personnel overhead; more SG&A than direct COGS in this context.
Balance sheet liability, not P&L COGS.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. (no clear COGS) Selected the broad 'Operating expenses' line as the best proxy for direct operating/cost of sales; depreciation and impairment are reported separately and thus excluded from COGS.

candidates.why: Revenue, not SG&A expense; should be excluded.
Likely includes miscellaneous overhead; appropriate as part of SG&A components excluding explicit depreciation/finance costs.
Main operating cost bucket, more akin to COGS for this business; should not be classified as SG&A.
Direct vessel operating costs; more COGS-like than SG&A.
Canonical SG&A bucket covering administrative overhead.
Share-based compensation, typically included within SG&A.

variables.notes: Following SG&A rules: use explicit overhead components while excluding COGS-like 'Operating expenses' and direct 'Other vessel operating expenses'. Included 'General and administrative expenses' (core SG&A), 'Other Operating Expenses' (misc overhead), and 'Share-Based Payments' (stock-based comp).
No research & development-related line items (e.g., R&D, research, development) appear in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews. Treating XRD as zero.

candidates.why: Primary reported interest expense line; includes total interest cost.
More specific breakdown of interest expense excluding lease-related amounts; good candidate for core interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Fair value adjustment interest rate swaps
candidates.why: Derivative fair value changes, not pure interest expense.
Generic interest expense line, but appears supplemental/empty here.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; component of total interest cost but narrower than main interest expense line.
Balance sheet liability, not P&L interest expense.
Accrued interest liability, not the expense flow itself.
Descriptor of liabilities, not an expense line.
Debt balance, not interest expense.
Liability classification, not an expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list for interest expense: core non-lease interest first, then total interest expenses, followed by lease-interest supplemental and a generic 'Interest Expense' line for older periods if used.

candidates.why: Income from associates, not a balance sheet equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Net income attributable to equity holders, not the equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive loss for the year attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Flow measure of comprehensive income, not an equity stock.
Component of equity, not total book equity.
Alternate/component equity line for some years; still not total equity.
Represents total shareholders’ equity; no separate non-controlling interest line is visible, so this is the best BE proxy.
Reported as total equity & minority interest, but numerically identical to Total Equity here, suggesting no separate minority interest; using Total Equity is clearer for BE.

variables.notes: Selected 'Total Equity' as book equity. There is no separate non-controlling interest line; 'Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest' matches the same figures, indicating minorities are effectively zero.

candidates.why: Label suggests inclusion of minority interests, but the amount equals Total Equity and there is no separate non-controlling interest line; implies minorities are zero in practice.

variables.notes: No distinct line for non-controlling/minority interests appears on the balance sheet. The combined 'Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest' equals 'Total Equity', indicating no separate minority interest amount; setting MIB to 0.
